title: Ghast Texture Backport
description: Backport of ghast retexture that is introduced with Summer Drop, Chase The Skies
body:

## Backport of ghast retexture that is introduced with Summer Drop
Compatible with almost every minecraft version and it has no dependency for working.

![Ghast With Its New Texture](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0106718651d289f17049b07aac7a188e51eee6aa.png)
*For more, check the [Gallery](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/ghast-texture-backport/gallery) section*
